## PR tags (required)
Select all that apply.

- [ ] docs-only
- [ ] tests-only
- [ ] tiny-change (<5 lines, single class/file)
- [ ] code-change
- [ ] scientific/algorithmic
- [ ] design/architecture
- [ ] GUI

## What changed
2-4 bullets in plain language.

- 
- 

## Why
1-2 lines on the user/problem impact.


## Issues closed
List issue references this PR closes (for example: `Closes #123`, `Fixes #456`).


## Target version (required)
Aiming for: `vX.Y.Z` / `next patch` / `unreleased`


## Validation
Mark each item as done or N/A. Add one short evidence line for each item.

- [ ] I ran ruff
  - Evidence (command + pass/fail):
  - N/A reason (if not run):

- [ ] I ran import-linter
  - Evidence (command + pass/fail):
  - N/A reason (if not run):

- [ ] I ran tests
  - Evidence (command + pass/fail):
  - N/A reason (if not run):
